title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese presents four decision-making rules attributed to Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei for determining what to build with Claude. The video positions these principles as guidance for individuals and businesses evaluating Claude-based projects.
